meanings.definition: the state of an engine or other mechanism that is idling
examples: the car engine was running at idle

meanings.definition: be idle; exist in a changeless situation
examples: The old man sat and stagnated on his porch
He slugged in bed all morning

meanings.definition: not in action or at work
without a basis in reason or fact

examples: the machinery sat idle during the strike

meanings.definition: lacking a sense of restraint or responsibility

examples: many people in the area were out of work
